content:
📜 The Fate Wheel will be spun in full view of the class, creating high-stakes anticipation.

✔ Fate Wheel Execution Rules:
• At the start of class, the Fate Wheel is spun in front of everyone.
• Everyone watches as their fates are decided.
• Some archetypes or items can alter the result before it takes effect.

✔ Why This Works:
✔ Builds dramatic tension (like a public execution).
✔ Allows for immediate reactions and counteractions.
✔ Encourages strategic preparation for unpredictable outcomes.

📜 4. A Unique, One-Per-Class Archetype – First Come, First Served

📜 One extremely rare and powerful archetype will exist in each class, available only to the first student to claim it.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 519 (chunk 519/555)
